title: EQ - Bass, Flat, Bright screens
scenario: Verify Bass, Flat, and Bright EQ presets are selectable, display correct UI values per Figma, and have locked sliders on supported devices.
steps: 1. Open the EQ settings on a device that supports EQ.
2. Locate and select the 'Bass' EQ preset.
3. Confirm the 'Bass' preset is applied correctly.
4. Verify the UI values and descriptions for the 'Bass' preset match the Figma design.
5. Ensure all sliders for the 'Bass' preset are locked (user cannot change values).
6. Locate and select the 'Flat' EQ preset.
7. Confirm the 'Flat' preset is applied correctly.
8. Verify the UI values and descriptions for the 'Flat' preset match the Figma design.
9. Ensure all sliders for the 'Flat' preset are locked (user cannot change values).
10. Locate and select the 'Bright' EQ preset.
11. Confirm the 'Bright' preset is applied correctly.
12. Verify the UI values and descriptions for the 'Bright' preset match the Figma design.
13. Ensure all sliders for the 'Bright' preset are locked (user cannot change values).
expected: All three EQ presets (Bass, Flat, Bright) can be selected and applied correctly. UI values and descriptions for each preset match the Figma design. All sliders are locked and user cannot change values.
